sections.markdown:
- Activity: Lunch Run
- Started: 2025-06-28 12:07
- Distance: 3.4 km
- Moving time: 29:34
- Elapsed time: 29:51
- Elevation gain: 13.6 m
- Average heart rate: 123.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 143 bpm
- Average watts: 138.5 W
- Average speed: 6.8 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `127.8 bpm`, ranging from `118.4` to `141.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `144.5 spm`, with a working range of `133.8` to `158.2 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `146.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `143.1 spm` (-3.5 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `8:46 /km` across `3.375 km` in `29:34` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `9:07 /km` and second-half pace was `8:24 /km` (-44 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `123.6 bpm` average and `143 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `120.1 bpm` in the first half and `126.7 bpm` in the second (+6.6 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `29:34` out of `29:51` elapsed (99.1%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `31` stop segments and `17.7%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `29.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.0 m` and `12.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `18.2 m` in the first half and `10.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
